subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-29 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Once during the imprisonment of the Blessed Beauty, I was very insistent to be taken to see Him.... They sent me with a black servant to His blessed presence in the prison. The warders indicated the cell
subcodes.first_line_orig: یکوقتی ما در طهران همه نوع اسباب آسایش و زندگانی داشتیم ولی در یکروز همه را غارت نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @incarceration of Baha'u'llah in Siyah Chal, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
